title: Fake Job Detection System
challenge: Recruitment fraud is increasingly common on online job portals, putting job seekers at risk of financial and identity theft.
solution: Built an NLP-based application using TF-IDF vectorization and Logistic Regression to classify fraudulent job postings, deployed via Streamlit.
results: Achieved real-time inference through a user-friendly Streamlit interface
Evaluated model performance using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score
Deployed live on Streamlit Community Cloud for public access
learnings: Building end-to-end NLP pipelines from text cleaning to model deployment
Optimizing TF-IDF features for binary classification in the recruitment domain
Deploying machine learning models as interactive web applications using Streamlit
